  "findings": [
    "Flashing is not lapped or sealed at joints, creating a direct path for water penetration into the building envelope."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on masonry veneer installation in the affected areas.",
    "Expose all unlapped/unsealed flashing joints.",
    "Lap flashing minimum 6 inches and seal with compatible adhesive/mastic per manufacturer specifications and BIA Tech Notes."
  ],
  "rationale": "Flashing must be continuous and properly lapped/sealed to direct water to the exterior via weep holes. Unsealed flashing joints fail to meet TMS 402 and BIA Technical Notes requirements for moisture control, posing a high risk of water intrusion and structural damage.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 402/602",
    "BIA Technical Notes 7"
  ]
}
